= Web4 Documentation Portal =

Welcome to the official Web4 documentation.

This wiki contains documentation for the complete Web4 ecosystem, including AI, blockchain, cloud infrastructure, APIs, SDKs, and developer resources.

------------------------------------------------------------

== Projects ==

* Web4
* QubuHub
* Aura Ecosystem
* Fadaka Blockchain
* GPT-5 Mini
* RODAAI
* NeuroMindAI
* LAMIS

------------------------------------------------------------

== Documentation ==

* Getting Started
* Installation
* Quick Start
* Architecture
* API Reference
* SDK Documentation
* Authentication
* Deployment
* Configuration

------------------------------------------------------------

== Developer Resources ==

* Project Structure
* Coding Standards
* Contributing Guide
* Docker
* CI/CD
* Security

------------------------------------------------------------

== Tutorials ==

* Build Your First AI
* Create an API
* Deploy to Production
* Blockchain Development
* AI Agents
* Model Integration

------------------------------------------------------------

== Reference ==

* CLI Commands
* Environment Variables
* Error Codes
* FAQ
* Changelog

------------------------------------------------------------

== Community ==

* Discussions
* Issues
* Roadmap
* Releases

------------------------------------------------------------

© 2026 Web4 Ecosystem.
